name: algomim
description: Call Algomim for project-aware CAD, BIM, design, and technical guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Built for consistent CAD and BIM results.
interface.longDescription: Call Algomim for project-aware AEC guidance through its hosted MCP service. Codex carries the relevant user intent, project evidence, prior guidance, and execution results into each independent consultation.
defaultPrompt: @algomim Use the current Rhino project context to guide this box workflow.
@algomim Bu CAD yaklaşımını mevcut proje bağlamı ve kanıtlarla değerlendir.
@algomim Guide this BIM review using the current project evidence.
